docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, MARIBEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, MONICA $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,048.00, DEFENDANT WAS 20 MINUTES LATE. PLAINTIFF HAD ALREADY LEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY GOMEZ, MARIBEL AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, MONICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-09-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-17-2000 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, MONICA
